meaning: adj.竞争的 vbl.vie的现在分词
examples: The two are vying for the support of New York voters.
She was surrounded by men all vying for her attention.
California is vying with other states to capture a piece of the growing communications market.
His craft may also soon be joined by other manned submersibles vying to reach the ocean's deepest depths.
Feinstein will be number one, and there are 23 other candidates vying for number two.
